projects.title: AGM Meeting Tracker
projects.description: Investor-focused platform that aggregates, synchronizes, and presents AGM/EGM meeting information for Bursa Malaysia shareholders through portfolio-aware filtering and responsive calendar views. Designed with responsive and purposeful data presentation in mind.

projects.title: Enrich.rpg
projects.description: AI-powered productivity platform that transforms goals into actionable quests using NVIDIA NIM, structured progression systems, and personalized reward mechanics. Designed with scalable backend architecture and responsive user experiences in mind.
